About Synergy Audio

Synergy Audio Visual is an importer and distributor of premium audio and video products.

A Division of Synergy Audio Visual

Focusing on the Custom Installation and Commercial AV markets, Synergy Custom & Commercial was founded to promote audio visual and integration products that are uncompromising in their technological design, function and integration capabilities.

The products we choose represent our core values of high performance, proven reliability and excellent value.
